stemHtml: During a flight from São Paulo (Brazil) to London (UK), in the middle of the Atlantic you can’t contact ATC. You meet in front of you a big group of active CB clouds, and the pilot flying decides to fly through them. What should the pilot do?

options.a: Maintain present FL, knowing also that ice may form and give you unreliable altitude and airspeed readout.
options.b: Accelerate to move through the layer in the least possible time.
options.c: Climb to a optimum FL and increase your pitch.
